title: YAML Document
documentation:
## Purpose
Represents a YAML document whose root is a mapping (key-value pairs). This is the most common YAML shape for configuration files and structured data.

## When to use
Use `media:record;textable;yaml` when a node produces or consumes a YAML mapping at the top level, such as a configuration file, a machine definition, or a metadata document. For a sequence of mappings, use [YAML List of Mappings](https://capdag.com/browse/media:list;record;textable;yaml).

## Notes
YAML mappings allow nested structures and references (anchors and aliases). Consumers should use a full YAML parser rather than simple line-by-line processing.
